heading: LOCAL OPTIONAL TEACHER DESIGNATION SYSTEM
operative_text: Subject to Subsection (b), a school district or open-enrollment charter school may designate a classroom teacher as a master, exemplary, recognized, or acknowledged teacher for a five-year period based on the results from single year or multiyear appraisals that comply with Section 21.351 or 21.352.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: a school district or open-enrollment charter school may designate a classroom teacher as a master, exemplary, recognized, or acknowledged teacher for a five-year period based on the results from single year or multiyear appraisals that comply with Section 21.351 or 21.352.
a classroom teacher that holds a National Board Certification issued by the National Board for Professional Teaching Standards may be designated as nationally board certified.
designate as enhanced teacher incentive allotment systems school districts and open-enrollment charter schools that implement comprehensive school evaluation and support systems.

_note: Full statute text provided and complete. Subsections (a) through (j) all present. Last amendment effective June 20, 2025 (Acts 2025, 89th Leg., Ch. 1065, H.B. 2).
